  • Uses of Move in controller

    Method

    Move[]
    CombatController.getPlayerMoves(int player)
    Convenience method to get all the moves associated the a player's active Mon.

    Field
    Description
    protected Move[]
    Mon.moves
     
    Methods in model that return Move
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Move[]
    Mon.getAllMoves()
    Returns a reference to the entire move array.
    Move
    Mon.getMove(int index)
    Returns a reference to the Move object at the provided index of the Mon.moves array.
